product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello there! I'm very interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV you have available. I was wondering if there might be any room for negotiation on the price?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Hello! That's excellent to hear. The LG C3 65-inch OLED is truly a fantastic choice, especially with its stunning OLED evo panel and gaming features. We typically offer it at $1,799, but for a serious buyer, I could offer it to you today for $1,699.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thanks for the offer. That's a good starting point, but I was really hoping to get closer to $1,499 for it.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand you're looking for the best value. The LG C3's incredible OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, and advanced gaming features truly make it a premium TV. I can meet you a bit further, offering it for $1,629 today.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate you coming down further. I was hoping to get closer to $1,550 for it.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I hear you. Given the exceptional picture quality, immersive sound, and comprehensive smart features of the LG C3, it truly stands out. I can adjust the price one more time to $1,599 to make this deal happen for you.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate you trying to make it work. I'm really looking for a price closer to $1,575.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Alright, $1,575 it is. That's a fantastic price for the LG C3 65-inch OLED, considering its premium features. You won't be disappointed.
